bead.title: S15-7: Multi-node trust attestation forwarding (Story-14 coupling)
bead.description: BLOCKING for any non-localhost write enablement. In Story-14 coordinator topology, ensure originating peer identity attestation is forwarded unchanged from coordinator → client; client authorizes on both origin and coordinator identity. Add ADR-conformance lint that flags any new mutation resolver bypassing requireTrusted or omitting CSRF/Origin check on prompt-driven endpoints. Requires Story 14 to land. See /tmp/story-15-final.md §Risks 'Multi-node authorization gap' and §Tests Multi-node line.
bead.acceptance: Coordinator forwards origin identity unchanged in mutation envelope; client-side authorization checks both origin and coordinator identity; ADR-conformance lint added to CI and fails on any new mutation resolver missing requireTrusted or CSRF/Origin checks; integration test exercises coordinator→client operator-prompt path with identity attestation.

events.body: Bead too large for one execute-bead pass; decomposed into 4 children. The 4 ACs span federation infrastructure that does not yet exist (mutation routing — current federation in cli/internal/federation/fanout.go supports only query fan-out, not coordinator→client mutation routing), identity propagation/dual authorization, a CI lint tool, and an E2E integration test. Each piece is non-trivial on its own (~200-400 LOC, distinct subsystems). Decomposition: - ddx-468d800f — S15-7a: ADR-conformance lint for mutation resolvers (requireTrusted + CSRF/Origin). Independently shippable today; no dependency on routing work. - ddx-eb75a32d — S15-7b: Coordinator→client mutation routing envelope (foundation). Adds RouteMutationToProjectOwner + ForwardMutation + hub forwarding handler. - ddx-ba31fec8 — S15-7c: Origin identity attestation forwarding + dual authorization (origin + coordinator). Depends on S15-7b. - ddx-ea1ada47 — S15-7d: Integration test — coordinator→client operatorPromptSubmit with identity attestation. Depends on S15-7b and S15-7c. Dependency edges added via `ddx bead dep add`. Parent bead ddx-256af8b5 annotated with --notes pointer to children. No code changes were made in this attempt.

no_changes

- ddx-468d800f — S15-7a: ADR-conformance lint for mutation resolvers (requireTrusted + CSRF/Origin). Independently shippable today; no dependency on routing work.

- ddx-ea1ada47 — S15-7d: Integration test — coordinator→client operatorPromptSubmit with identity attestation. Depends on S15-7b and S15-7c.
